hypothesis: Deadline urgency scoring (EXP-035, 24 tests) depends on ISO date fields but all 3 post-processors leave deadline as raw Korean text (D-3, ~04/30(수) 마감, 상시모집). The urgency computation and NLP deadline queries (마감임박, 오늘 마감) cannot work against raw text.

metrics.deadline_formats_supported: D-N, N일전, N주전, MM/DD, YYYY.MM.DD, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY-MM-DD, 상시모집
